channel.title: GitHub CSS Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of CSS in GitHub

item.title: MrOtherGuy/firefox-csshacks
item.description: Collection of userstyles affecting the browser

item.title: isocpp/CppCoreGuidelines
item.description: The C++ Core Guidelines are a set of tried-and-true guidelines, rules, and best practices about coding in C++

item.title: IBM/plex
item.description: The package of IBM’s typeface, IBM Plex.

item.title: animate-css/animate.css
item.description: 🍿 A cross-browser library of CSS animations. As easy to use as an easy thing.

item.title: aws-samples/amplify-next-template
item.description: This is a Next.js starter for building a fullstack app with AWS Amplify.

item.title: panr/hugo-theme-terminal
item.description: A simple, retro theme for Hugo

item.title: jd-opensource/micro-app
item.description: A simple, efficient and powerful micro front-end framework. 一款简约、高效、功能强大的微前端框架

item.title: primefaces/primereact
item.description: The Most Complete React UI Component Library

item.title: refact0r/midnight-discord
item.description: A dark, rounded discord theme.

item.title: bradtraversy/50projects50days
item.description: 50+ mini web projects using HTML, CSS & JS

item.title: refact0r/system24
item.description: a tui-style discord theme

item.title: sindresorhus/github-markdown-css
item.description: The minimal amount of CSS to replicate the GitHub Markdown style

item.title: nakov/Practical-Cryptography-for-Developers-Book
item.description: Practical Cryptography for Developers: Hashes, MAC, Key Derivation, DHKE, Symmetric and Asymmetric Ciphers, Public Key Cryptosystems, RSA, Elliptic Curves, ECC, secp256k1, ECDH, ECIES, Digital Signatures, ECDSA, EdDSA

item.title: imfing/hextra
item.description: 🔯 Modern, batteries-included Hugo theme for creating beautiful doc, blog and static websites

item.title: rafaelmardojai/firefox-gnome-theme
item.description: A GNOME👣 theme for Firefox🔥

item.title: spring-projects/spring-petclinic
item.description: A sample Spring-based application

item.title: ryanoasis/nerd-fonts
item.description: Iconic font aggregator, collection, & patcher. 3,600+ icons, 50+ patched fonts: Hack, Source Code Pro, more. Glyph collections: Font Awesome, Material Design Icons, Octicons, & more

item.title: lipis/flag-icons
item.description: 🎏 A curated collection of all country flags in SVG — plus the CSS for easier integration

item.title: missing-semester-cn/missing-semester-cn.github.io
item.description: the CS missing semester Chinese version
